hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$d = $input | Out-String | ConvertFrom-Json; $t = if ($d.title) { $d.title } else { 'Claude finished' }; $m = if ($d.message) { $d.message } else { 'Response complete' }; $script = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR 'claude_resources\scripts\notify.bat'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { $script = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR '.claude\scripts\notify.bat' }; & $script $t $m"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$d = $input | Out-String | ConvertFrom-Json; $t = if ($d.title) { $d.title } else { 'Claude attention' }; $m = if ($d.message) { $d.message } else { 'Awaiting input' }; $script = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR 'claude_resources\scripts\notify.bat'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { $script = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR '.claude\scripts\notify.bat' }; & $script $t $m"
